title: Kindergarten Care Teacher Programme [SL]
description:
• Engage with children aged 4 to 6 years old through play, interaction, and structured classroom management.
  • Plan and deliver developmental and engaging programmes/activities that foster learning and growth.
  • Instill positive values and guide children in their social, emotional, and moral development.
  • Set up learning environments and resources in alignment with KCare Programme safety and health guidelines.
  • Build strong rapport with parents, providing updates on their children’s development, achievements, and areas of growth.
  • Facilitate both indoor and outdoor activities, ensuring children are meaningfully engaged throughout the day.
  • Ensure the safety and well-being of every child, observing closely for signs of ill health, emotional needs, or developmental concerns.
  • Provide warmth, care, and emotional support to children as needed.
  • Maintain order and discipline in both the classroom and playground environments.
  • Undertake any other duties or projects assigned by the immediate superior.

Requirements

  • WSQ Student Care Centre - Early Years (EY) or
  • Advanced Certificate in Early Childhood Care & Education (ACECCE)
  • Diploma in Early Childhood Education (DECCE-T) or equivalent

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.
